evals.prompt: Assess this project against all matching checkpoint-enabled skills. Run the full assessment.
evals.expected_output: Runs /assess command, discovers matching skills via preconditions, executes mechanical checks and LLM reviews, produces compliance report.
assertions: Invokes the /assess command or equivalent assessment workflow
Discovers skills by evaluating preconditions against the project
Runs mechanical checkpoint types (file_exists, contains, regex, etc.)
Groups LLM checkpoints by domain for parallel review
Produces a structured compliance report with pass/fail per checkpoint

evals.prompt: Run mechanical checks only on this project, skip all LLM reviews.
evals.expected_output: Runs /assess --mechanical-only, executing only scripted checks without LLM review agents.
assertions: Executes file_exists, contains, regex, command checks
Does NOT spawn LLM review agents
Reports results with severity levels (error, warning, info)
Completes faster than full assessment due to skipping LLM

evals.prompt: Assess this project against the skill-repo skill only, not all skills.
evals.expected_output: Runs /assess skill-repo, limiting checkpoints to the named skill.
assertions: Passes skill name as argument to limit scope
Only runs checkpoints from the specified skill
Does not run checkpoints from other skills
Produces report scoped to the named skill
